name: Example: strong proposal (synthetic)
notes: synthetic fixture for harness smoke test
input_text:
PROPOSAL: NHS Spine Integration Platform — submitted to Imperial College Healthcare NHS Trust by NorthStar Consulting, March 2024.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

We have done this exact integration before, in production, at scale — not a pilot, not a POC. Over the last 18 months we delivered FHIR-to-Spine integrations for 47 NHS Trusts using a single event-driven Kafka pipeline. Zero downtime across the rollout. Average onboarding cycle reduced from 14 days to 3.

Three things distinguish this proposal from a competent alternative, and we'll prove each one in the section that follows: (1) a production-tested adapter pattern, not a green-field design; (2) a named clinical safety lead — Sarah Chen, ISACA CISA, NHS DSPT auditor since 2021 — already cleared on the Trust DSPT; (3) a fixed-price commercial model that absorbs scope variance up to 15%.

TECHNICAL APPROACH

We will reuse the same OAuth 2.0 federation pattern referenced in section 4.2 of the RFP. Our lead architect ran the Met Office's £12M data migration — a project explicitly cited in the G-Cloud 14 procurement framework as reference architecture for event-driven public sector integrations.

Our methodology combines PRINCE2 governance with SAFe 5.0 delivery cadence. This is not boilerplate: the SAFe cadence specifically front-loads the integration risk in the first PI, which is the pattern that succeeded at HMRC and failed at the previous supplier here.

CREDIBILITY EVIDENCE

- 47 NHS Trust integrations delivered live (named in Annex B)
- Zero clinical safety incidents across the portfolio
- Current DSPT submission status: compliant for all 47 sites
- Sarah Chen led IG on the Imperial College Healthcare contract in 2022 — same Trust, same governance regime

COMMERCIAL MODEL

£1.85M fixed price for the 24-month contract, including the absorbed-scope clause. This is 12% below the rate-card equivalent and is achievable because we are reusing existing IP, not building from scratch.
